fields_expanded.name: Parties
fields_expanded.comments: Component block, see section 13.4 Must be filled in to request trades for GUI users.
Number of parties specified.

ID of firm or trader. Required if NoPartyID's (453) > 0. When: Party Role (452) = 3, PartyIDSource (447) =P , PartyID should be integer only with '0' for No Client, '1' for AGGR and '2' for PNAL Party Role (452) = 3, Party ID should be alphanumeric Party Role (452) = 122, Party ID should be integer only PartyRole (452) = 300, PartyID should be integer only Party Role (452) = 301, PartyID should be integer only Party Role (452) = 26, PartyID should be a 3 character

Identifies the type of PartyID (Eg. Executing Broker). Required if NoPartyID's (453) > 0. Valid values: 1 = Executing Firm 3 = Client ID - Required only for Client Orders (581=1,3 or 7) 4 = Clearing Firm 7 = Entering Firm 11 = Order Origination Trader 24 = Customer Account - Required only for Client Orders (581=1, 3 or 7) 26 = Correspondent broker - non-executive broker 35 = Liquidity Provider 36 = Entering Trader 66 = Market Maker 122 = Decision Maker - Required only for Client Orders (581=1, 3 or 7)

fields_raw_normalized.comments: Valid values: F = Trade H = Trade Cancel

fields_raw_normalized.comments: Indicates if this is the last report in the response to a Trade Capture Report Request (AD). Only used in response to Trade Capture Report Request. The last message will have LastRptRequested = Y and all previous

fields_raw_normalized.name: PreviouslyReported
fields_raw_normalized.comments: The value here will always be N (false).

fields_raw_normalized.comments: Example value TAAA20100331X0000001.

fields_raw_normalized.name: LastQty
fields_raw_normalized.comments: Trade quantity.

fields_raw_normalized.name: LastPx
fields_raw_normalized.comments: Trade price.

fields_raw_normalized.name: TradeDate
fields_raw_normalized.comments: Format is YYYYMMDD.

fields_raw_normalized.name: NoLegs
fields_raw_normalized.comments: Set if ExecType = F (Trade) and the trade is done in a multi-leg contract such as a carry, an average contract, metal options or metal option strips. (See section 6.1.4 Execution Reports for Multi-Leg Contracts for details).

fields_raw_normalized.name: LegSymbol
fields_raw_normalized.comments: A two-letter string describing the metal or index for this leg. This is the start tag for the repeating group and is mandatory if NoLegs > 0.
